commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 03 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings, featuring the tightest ILLIQ metric (0.0014) and lowest Roll spread (1.0239%), reflecting deep order books and minimal price impact. Conversely, London Stock Exchange trails significantly with ILLIQ at 0.1230—88 times higher than NYSE—and the widest AR spread (0.8172%). Notably, Nasdaq 100's paradoxically low ILLIQ (0.0026) contrasts sharply with its elevated Roll spread (1.6702%), suggesting concentrated trading volumes offsetting wider effective spreads.
